pi_items.source: Verified from task.json description which explicitly requests creating a repository named legacy-dev-local.
Verified from task.json description which explicitly requests creating a Maven repository.
Verified from task.json description which explicitly requests setting Maven Snapshot Version Behavior to Non-unique.
Verified from environment scripts (setup_artifactory.sh and task_utils.sh) which hardcode the Artifactory admin username as admin.
Verified from environment scripts (setup_artifactory.sh and task_utils.sh) which hardcode the Artifactory admin password as password.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Maven repository with the key legacy-dev-local and setting its snapshot behavior to non-unique. The Artifactory instance uses the default credentials of admin for the username and password for the password, as confirmed by the environment setup scripts.
